message:
feat: add 34 new color themes for comprehensive theme coverage

Add Monokai, Solarized Dark/Light, Gruvbox Dark/Light, OneDark,
TokyoNight, all four Catppuccin variants (Mocha/Latte/Frappe/Macchiato),
RosePine, NightOwl, Dracula, MaterialOcean, Ayu Dark/Light,
Kanagawa Wave/Lotus, Everforest Dark/Light, GitHub Dark/Light,
Synthwave84, Palenight, HorizonDark, Nord, OneLight, Nightfox,
Dayfox, OceanicNext, Cobalt2, and PaperColor Dark/Light.

ThemeId::ALL expands from 7 to 41 entries. Test assertions updated
for new counts. New tests for harmonized syntax semantics and
text hierarchy contrast ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
